data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for sending physical postcards as appointment reminders for elderly patients without email. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation of this feature, such as API reads or persisted state checks. The linked use case mentions the requirement but does not provide supporting evidence or endpoints that demonstrate its functionality, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of physical postcard generation for appointment reminders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the postcard generation for appointment reminders.
